name: iksula-agents
description: Iksula's agentic-org skills across the Product/Offering and Commercial streams: vertical-process-mapping, solutions-architect-create, research-solutions, thought-leadership, content-creator, media-planner, and pranaam — the session bootstrap that connects a Claude instance to the shared Brain.
